attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
coalesce(SCSOT.CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,-999)     CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ,           
coalesce(SOXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE, '=') BK_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TYPE_CD,
SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS CS_SO_TASK_STATUS_CD,          
coalesce(SOXEL.ERROR_TYPE,'=') CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TYPE,      
CAST(SOXEL.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CS_SO_TASK_CREATED_DTM  ,      
coalesce(SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID, -999) SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT ,         
SCSOT.SS_CD  SS_CD ,                        
SCSOT.SS_TABLE_CD  SS_TABLE_CD,                   
CASE 
WHEN SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS ='OBSOLETE'  AND EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG  ,     
SOXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION      CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TXT ,      
CASE WHEN SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID>999999999999999999 THEN -999 else  SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID END       ORDER_LINE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SOXEL
INNER JOIN
$$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
on
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID AND SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME=EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME
AND
EOXOH.OPERATION='CREATE'
inner join
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
ON
EOXOH.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV' END = NSOT.SS_CODE 
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK SCSOT
ON
SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID = SCSOT.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV' END = SCSOT.SS_CD
AND
SCSOT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'ICW'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID, SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOXEL.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.XXCCP_HEADER_ID, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.QUOTE_NUMBER, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.HEADER_ID , 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.GLOBAL_NAME, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.STATUS, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.SUB_STATUS, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_NUMBER, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CS_CASE_NUMBER, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CS_REQUEST_ID, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CONTEXT, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.ORDERED_DATE, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_TYPE_ID, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CREATED_BY, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CREATION_DATE, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.OPERATION, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.BATCH_ID, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER

SELECT
COALESCE(SCSOT.CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,-999)     CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ,           
COALESCE(SOXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE, '=') BK_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TYPE_CD,
SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS CS_SO_TASK_STATUS_CD,          
COALESCE(SOXEL.ERROR_TYPE,'=') CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TYPE,      
CAST(SOXEL.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CS_SO_TASK_CREATED_DTM  ,      
COALESCE(SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID, -999) SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT ,         
SCSOT.SS_CD  SS_CD ,                        
SCSOT.SS_TABLE_CD  SS_TABLE_CD,                   
CASE 
WHEN SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS ='OBSOLETE'  AND EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG  ,     
SOXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION      CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_TXT ,      
CASE WHEN SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID>999999999999999999 THEN -999 else  SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID END       ORDER_LINE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SOXEL
INNER JOIN
$$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
ON
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID AND SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME=EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME
AND
EOXOH.OPERATION='CREATE'
INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
ON
EOXOH.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' THEN 'CG' END = NSOT.SS_CODE 
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK SCSOT
ON
SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID = SCSOT.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' THEN 'CG' END = SCSOT.SS_CD
AND
SCSOT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'ICW'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID, SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOXEL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC) = 1
